signals.headline: Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson Announces 2026 Gubernatorial Bid | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson Announces 2026 Gubernatorial Bid | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ty Masterson, current Kansas state Senate president and a Republican, officially announced his candidacy for Kansas governor on Sunday, joining other GOP contenders like Jeff Colyer, Scott Schwab, and Vicki Schmidt to challenge term-limited Democratic Gov. Laura Kelly in the 2026 race.[1][2][3]
